title: Bitcoin’s (BTC/USD) Price Outlook: Struggling Against Resistance in a High-Stakes Consolidation Phase
description: Bitcoin (BTC/USD) is in a high-stakes consolidation phase On the H4 chart, BTC is trading below the 50-MA and the 100-MA.
